text: iakōbos theou kai kyriou iēsou christou doulos tais dōdeka phylais tais en tē diaspora chairein
pasan charan ēgēsasthe adelphoi mou otan peirasmois peripesēte poikilois
ginōskontes oti to dokimion ymōn tēs pisteōs katergazetai ypomonēn
ē de ypomonē ergon teleion echetō ina ēte teleioi kai oloklēroi en mēdeni leipomenoi
ei de tis ymōn leipetai sophias aiteitō para tou didontos theou pasin aplōs kai mē oneidizontos kai dothēsetai autō
aiteitō de en pistei mēden diakrinomenos o gar diakrinomenos eoiken klydōni thalassēs anemizomenō kai ripizomenō
mē gar oiesthō o anthrōpos ekeinos oti lēpsetai ti para tou kyriou
anēr dipsychos akatastatos en pasais tais odois autou
kauchasthō de o adelphos o tapeinos en tō ypsei autou
o de plousios en tē tapeinōsei autou oti ōs anthos chortou pareleusetai
aneteilen gar o ēlios syn tō kausōni kai exēranen ton chorton kai to anthos autou exepesen kai ē euprepeia tou prosōpou autou apōleto outōs kai o plousios en tais poreiais autou maranthēsetai
makarios anēr os ypomenei peirasmon oti dokimos genomenos lēpsetai ton stephanon tēs zōēs on epēngeilato o kyrios tois agapōsin auton
mēdeis peirazomenos legetō oti apo tou theou peirazomai o gar theos apeirastos estin kakōn peirazei de autos oudena
ekastos de peirazetai ypo tēs idias epithymias exelkomenos kai deleazomenos
eita ē epithymia syllabousa tiktei amartian ē de amartia apotelestheisa apokyei thanaton
mē planasthe adelphoi mou agapētoi
pasa dosis agathē kai pan dōrēma teleion anōthen estin katabainon apo tou patros tōn phōtōn par ō ouk eni parallagē ē tropēs aposkiasma
boulētheis apekyēsen ēmas logō alētheias eis to einai ēmas aparchēn tina tōn autou ktismatōn
ōste adelphoi mou agapētoi estō pas anthrōpos tachys eis to akousai bradys eis to lalēsai bradys eis orgēn
orgē gar andros dikaiosynēn theou ou katergazetai
dio apothemenoi pasan ryparian kai perisseian kakias en prautēti dexasthe ton emphyton logon ton dynamenon sōsai tas psychas ymōn
ginesthe de poiētai logou kai mē monon akroatai paralogizomenoi eautous
oti ei tis akroatēs logou estin kai ou poiētēs outos eoiken andri katanoounti to prosōpon tēs geneseōs autou en esoptrō
katenoēsen gar eauton kai apelēlythen kai eutheōs epelatheto opoios ēn
o de parakypsas eis nomon teleion ton tēs eleutherias kai parameinas outos ouk akroatēs epilēsmonēs genomenos alla poiētēs ergou outos makarios en tē poiēsei autou estai
ei tis dokei thrēskos einai en ymin mē chalinagōgōn glōssan autou all apatōn kardian autou toutou mataios ē thrēskeia
thrēskeia kathara kai amiantos para tō theō kai patri autē estin episkeptesthai orphanous kai chēras en tē thlipsei autōn aspilon eauton tērein apo tou kosmou
adelphoi mou mē en prosōpolēpsiais echete tēn pistin tou kyriou ēmōn iēsou christou tēs doxēs
ean gar eiselthē eis tēn synagōgēn ymōn anēr chrysodaktylios en esthēti lampra eiselthē de kai ptōchos en rypara esthēti
kai epiblepsēte epi ton phorounta tēn esthēta tēn lampran kai eipēte autō sy kathou ōde kalōs kai tō ptōchō eipēte sy stēthi ekei ē kathou ōde ypo to ypopodion mou
kai ou diekrithēte en eautois kai egenesthe kritai dialogismōn ponērōn
akousate adelphoi mou agapētoi ouch o theos exelexato tous ptōchous tou kosmou toutou plousious en pistei kai klēronomous tēs basileias ēs epēngeilato tois agapōsin auton
ymeis de ētimasate ton ptōchon ouch oi plousioi katadynasteuousin ymōn kai autoi elkousin ymas eis kritēria
ouk autoi blasphēmousin to kalon onoma to epiklēthen eph ymas
ei mentoi nomon teleite basilikon kata tēn graphēn agapēseis ton plēsion sou ōs seauton kalōs poieite
ei de prosōpolēpteite amartian ergazesthe elenchomenoi ypo tou nomou ōs parabatai
ostis gar olon ton nomon tērēsei ptaisei de en eni gegonen pantōn enochos
o gar eipōn mē moicheusēs eipen kai mē phoneusēs ei de ou moicheuseis phoneuseis de gegonas parabatēs nomou
outōs laleite kai outōs poieite ōs dia nomou eleutherias mellontes krinesthai
ē gar krisis anileōs tō mē poiēsanti eleos kai katakauchatai eleos kriseōs
ti to ophelos adelphoi mou ean pistin legē tis echein erga de mē echē mē dynatai ē pistis sōsai auton
ean de adelphos ē adelphē gymnoi yparchōsin kai leipomenoi ōsin tēs ephēmerou trophēs
eipē de tis autois ex ymōn ypagete en eirēnē thermainesthe kai chortazesthe mē dōte de autois ta epitēdeia tou sōmatos ti to ophelos
outōs kai ē pistis ean mē erga echē nekra estin kath eautēn
all erei tis sy pistin echeis kagō erga echō deixon moi tēn pistin sou ek tōn ergōn sou kagō deixō soi ek tōn ergōn mou tēn pistin mou
sy pisteueis oti o theos eis estin kalōs poieis kai ta daimonia pisteuousin kai phrissousin
theleis de gnōnai ō anthrōpe kene oti ē pistis chōris tōn ergōn nekra estin
abraam o patēr ēmōn ouk ex ergōn edikaiōthē anenenkas isaak ton uion autou epi to thysiastērion
blepeis oti ē pistis synērgei tois ergois autou kai ek tōn ergōn ē pistis eteleiōthē
kai eplērōthē ē graphē ē legousa episteusen de abraam tō theō kai elogisthē autō eis dikaiosynēn kai philos theou eklēthē
orate toinyn oti ex ergōn dikaioutai anthrōpos kai ouk ek pisteōs monon
omoiōs de kai raab ē pornē ouk ex ergōn edikaiōthē ypodexamenē tous angelous kai etera odō ekbalousa
ōsper gar to sōma chōris pneumatos nekron estin outōs kai ē pistis chōris tōn ergōn nekra estin
mē polloi didaskaloi ginesthe adelphoi mou eidotes oti meizon krima lēpsometha
polla gar ptaiomen apantes ei tis en logō ou ptaiei outos teleios anēr dynatos chalinagōgēsai kai olon to sōma
idou tōn ippōn tous chalinous eis ta stomata ballomen pros to peithesthai autous ēmin kai olon to sōma autōn metagomen
idou kai ta ploia tēlikauta onta kai ypo sklērōn anemōn elaunomena metagetai ypo elachistou pēdaliou opou an ē ormē tou euthynontos boulētai
outōs kai ē glōssa mikron melos estin kai megalauchei idou oligon pyr ēlikēn ylēn anaptei
kai ē glōssa pyr o kosmos tēs adikias outōs ē glōssa kathistatai en tois melesin ēmōn ē spilousa olon to sōma kai phlogizousa ton trochon tēs geneseōs kai phlogizomenē ypo tēs geennēs
pasa gar physis thēriōn te kai peteinōn erpetōn te kai enaliōn damazetai kai dedamastai tē physei tē anthrōpinē
tēn de glōssan oudeis dynatai anthrōpōn damasai akatascheton kakon mestē iou thanatēphorou
en autē eulogoumen ton theon kai patera kai en autē katarōmetha tous anthrōpous tous kath omoiōsin theou gegonotas
ek tou autou stomatos exerchetai eulogia kai katara ou chrē adelphoi mou tauta outōs ginesthai
mēti ē pēgē ek tēs autēs opēs bryei to glyky kai to pikron
mē dynatai adelphoi mou sykē elaias poiēsai ē ampelos syka outōs oudemia pēgē alykon kai glyky poiēsai ydōr
tis sophos kai epistēmōn en ymin deixatō ek tēs kalēs anastrophēs ta erga autou en prautēti sophias
ei de zēlon pikron echete kai eritheian en tē kardia ymōn mē katakauchasthe kai pseudesthe kata tēs alētheias
ouk estin autē ē sophia anōthen katerchomenē all epigeios psychikē daimoniōdēs
opou gar zēlos kai eritheia ekei akatastasia kai pan phaulon pragma
ē de anōthen sophia prōton men agnē estin epeita eirēnikē epieikēs eupeithēs mestē eleous kai karpōn agathōn adiakritos kai anypokritos
karpos de tēs dikaiosynēs en eirēnē speiretai tois poiousin eirēnēn
pothen polemoi kai machai en ymin ouk enteuthen ek tōn ēdonōn ymōn tōn strateuomenōn en tois melesin ymōn
epithymeite kai ouk echete phoneuete kai zēloute kai ou dynasthe epitychein machesthe kai polemeite ouk echete de dia to mē aiteisthai ymas
aiteite kai ou lambanete dioti kakōs aiteisthe ina en tais ēdonais ymōn dapanēsēte
moichoi kai moichalides ouk oidate oti ē philia tou kosmou echthra tou theou estin os an oun boulēthē philos einai tou kosmou echthros tou theou kathistatai
ē dokeite oti kenōs ē graphē legei pros phthonon epipothei to pneuma o katōkēsen en ēmin
meizona de didōsin charin dio legei o theos yperēphanois antitassetai tapeinois de didōsin charin
ypotagēte oun tō theō antistēte tō diabolō kai pheuxetai aph ymōn
engisate tō theō kai engiei ymin katharisate cheiras amartōloi kai agnisate kardias dipsychoi
talaipōrēsate kai penthēsate kai klausate o gelōs ymōn eis penthos metastraphētō kai ē chara eis katēpheian
tapeinōthēte enōpion tou kyriou kai ypsōsei ymas
mē katalaleite allēlōn adelphoi o katalalōn adelphou kai krinōn ton adelphon autou katalalei nomou kai krinei nomon ei de nomon krineis ouk ei poiētēs nomou alla kritēs
eis estin o nomothetēs o dynamenos sōsai kai apolesai sy tis ei os krineis ton eteron
age nyn oi legontes sēmeron ē aurion poreusometha eis tēnde tēn polin kai poiēsomen ekei eniauton ena kai emporeusometha kai kerdēsomen
oitines ouk epistasthe to tēs aurion poia gar ē zōē ymōn atmis gar estin ē pros oligon phainomenē epeita de aphanizomenē
anti tou legein ymas ean o kyrios thelēsē kai zēsōmen kai poiēsomen touto ē ekeino
nyn de kauchasthe en tais alazoneiais ymōn pasa kauchēsis toiautē ponēra estin
eidoti oun kalon poiein kai mē poiounti amartia autō estin
age nyn oi plousioi klausate ololyzontes epi tais talaipōriais ymōn tais eperchomenais
o ploutos ymōn sesēpen kai ta imatia ymōn sētobrōta gegonen
o chrysos ymōn kai o argyros katiōtai kai o ios autōn eis martyrion ymin estai kai phagetai tas sarkas ymōn ōs pyr ethēsaurisate en eschatais ēmerais
idou o misthos tōn ergatōn tōn amēsantōn tas chōras ymōn o apesterēmenos aph ymōn krazei kai ai boai tōn therisantōn eis ta ōta kyriou sabaōth eiselēlythasin
etryphēsate epi tēs gēs kai espatalēsate ethrepsate tas kardias ymōn ōs en ēmera sphagēs
katedikasate ephoneusate ton dikaion ouk antitassetai ymin
makrothymēsate oun adelphoi eōs tēs parousias tou kyriou idou o geōrgos ekdechetai ton timion karpon tēs gēs makrothymōn ep autō eōs an labē yeton prōimon kai opsimon
makrothymēsate kai ymeis stērixate tas kardias ymōn oti ē parousia tou kyriou ēngiken
mē stenazete kat allēlōn adelphoi ina mē katakrithēte idou kritēs pro tōn thyrōn estēken
ypodeigma labete tēs kakopatheias adelphoi mou kai tēs makrothymias tous prophētas oi elalēsan tō onomati kyriou
idou makarizomen tous ypomenontas tēn ypomonēn iōb ēkousate kai to telos kyriou eidete oti polysplanchnos estin o kyrios kai oiktirmōn
pro pantōn de adelphoi mou mē omnyete mēte ton ouranon mēte tēn gēn mēte allon tina orkon ētō de ymōn to nai nai kai to ou ou ina mē ypo krisin pesēte
kakopathei tis en ymin proseuchesthō euthymei tis psalletō
asthenei tis en ymin proskalesasthō tous presbyterous tēs ekklēsias kai proseuxasthōsan ep auton aleipsantes auton elaiō en tō onomati tou kyriou
kai ē euchē tēs pisteōs sōsei ton kamnonta kai egerei auton o kyrios kan amartias ē pepoiēkōs aphethēsetai autō
exomologeisthe allēlois ta paraptōmata kai euchesthe yper allēlōn opōs iathēte poly ischyei deēsis dikaiou energoumenē
ēlias anthrōpos ēn omoiopathēs ēmin kai proseuchē prosēuxato tou mē brexai kai ouk ebrexen epi tēs gēs eniautous treis kai mēnas ex
kai palin prosēuxato kai o ouranos yeton edōken kai ē gē eblastēsen ton karpon autēs
adelphoi ean tis en ymin planēthē apo tēs alētheias kai epistrepsē tis auton
ginōsketō oti o epistrepsas amartōlon ek planēs odou autou sōsei psychēn ek thanatou kai kalypsei plēthos amartiōn
